title: Building the App Store for Agentic Engineering
summary: Cole Medin is building a workflow marketplace for Archon, a platform that enables users to define YAML-based agentic workflows running in isolated git worktrees across any model provider. The marketplace will allow developers to share and discover pre-built, battle-tested workflows for AI coding tasks.
